zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Hoo於1370年出生在英國貝德福爾盧頓 胡時，他的父親Sir William Hoo28歲，母親Alice St Omer30歲。他於大約1395年與Eleanor Felton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1420年8月23日在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Hoo于1370年出生在英国貝德福爾盧頓 胡时，他的父亲Sir William Hoo28岁，母亲Alice St Omer30岁。他于大约1395年与Eleanor Felton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1420年8月23日在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hoo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Wai Lam, Wing, Beng, Chin, Gan, Hing, Hui, Kee, Lai, Lai Ching, Mei-Mei.
variant Romanization of the surname   Hu  .

variants.name: Hu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Ming, Ping, Bin, Yi, Ying, Jing, Xiao, Qi, Yan, Chi.  Korean Chang, Chung, Min, Yiping, Chong, Chul, Hu, Jung Soo, Sang Hoon, Tian, Wook, Yiming.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 胡, a term referring to the ethnic minorities in ancient northern and western China: (i) from Hu (胡), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Henan province) during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771 BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Zheng (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) in the 26th year of the reign of King Ping of Zhou (died 720 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (ii) from Hu (胡), the name of a state (located in present-day Anhui province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu in the 15th year of the reign of Duke Ding of Lu (ruler of the state of Lu, reigned 509–495 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (iii) from the personal name of Hu Gong Man (胡公满, Duke Hu of Chen), the posthumous title of Yu Man. He was given the fief of Chen (located mainly in present-day Henan and Anhui province) by King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). (iv) from the personal name of Hu Guang (胡廣), who changed his original surname 黃 to 胡 during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ). (v) from the Hu Gu (胡骨) or He Gu (纥骨) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their surname to 胡 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 扈, meaning ‘retinue’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Hu (扈), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Shaanxi province) dating back to the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ) (ii) adopted as a surname by the Hu Di Gan (扈地干) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Hoo was born in 1370, in Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Sir William Hoo, was 28 and his mother, Alice St Omer, was 30. He married Eleanor Felton about 1395. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 23 August 1420, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Hoo est né en 1370, à Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Hoo, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice St Omer, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Felton environ 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 23 août 1420, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Hoo 1370 in Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Hoo 28 und seine Mutter Alice St Omer 30. Er hat um 1395 Eleanor Felton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 23. August 1420 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Hoo è nato il nel 1370 nel Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Hoo, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Alice St Omer, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Felton circa 1395. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 23 agosto 1420, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hooが1370年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトン ホーオで生まれた時，父Sir William Hooは28歳，母Alice St Omerは30歳であった。約1395年にEleanor Feltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1420年8月23日に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hoo(이)가 1370년 영국 베드퍼드실르 루턴 후에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Hoo(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice St Omer(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1395년 Eleanor Felton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1420년 8월 23일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Hoo nasceu em 1370, em Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Hoo, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice St Omer, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Felton aproximadamente 1395. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1420, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Hoo родился в 1370 г. в местности лутон ху, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Hoo было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice St Omer, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Felton около 1395 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 23 августа 1420 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Eleanor Felton aproximadamente 1395. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1420, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
